body:
If you're looking for **24/7 emergency garage door repair in the East Bay** , these companies advertise around-the-clock support or emergency phone coverage:

Company| Area Served| 24/7 Support  
---|---|---  
R&S Overhead Garage Door, Inc.| San Leandro, Oakland, Hayward, East Bay| 24/7 emergency repairs; technicians available around the clock. [Expert Garage Door Company in San Leandro, CA | R&S Overhead](https://rsdoors.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)  
Precision Garage Door of Bay Area| Hayward, Oakland, Walnut Creek, Pleasanton, Fremont| Phones answered 24/7 with emergency service available. [Contact Precision Garage Door Of East Bay | Repair, Openers & New Garage Doors](https://precisiondooreastbay.com/contact?utm_source=chatgpt.com)  
Certified Garage Doors LLC| Hayward and surrounding East Bay| Listed as open 24 hours every day.  
Safety Garage Door Repair & Installation| Hayward| Open 24/7 according to business listings.  
Doors on Demand| Fremont| Open 24/7 for garage door service.  
Precise Garage Door and Automatic Gates| Walnut Creek, Contra Costa County| Advertises 24-hour emergency service.  
Dr. Garage Doors Repairs| Concord| Open 24 hours with emergency service.  
Allroads Overhead Garage Doors| Richmond and West Contra Costa| 24-hour availability.  
Ontime Garage Doors Service| San Ramon and Tri-Valley| Open 24/7.  
Gil's Garage Door & Gates| Moraga, Lamorinda| Open 24/7 according to business listings.  
  
Other Bay Area companies that specifically advertise **24/7 emergency service** and also serve parts of the East Bay include:

  * **Integrity Garage Doors & Gates** (based in Castro Valley) – emergency service throughout the East Bay. [Bay Area Garage Door Service Areas | Integrity GD](https://integritygd.com/locations/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * **Nor-Cal Overhead** – 24/7 emergency repairs with an East Bay service line. [24 Hour Emergency Service | Nor-Cal Overhead | Bay Area, CA](https://www.norcaloverheaddoor.com/services/24-hour-emergency-service/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * **YBM Garage Doors** – 24/7 emergency service across the Bay Area, including the East Bay. [Contact Us | YBM Garage Doors](https://ybmgaragedoors.com/contact-us/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  * **Olive Garage Doors** – advertises 24/7 emergency garage door repair across the Bay Area. [Garage Door Repair Bay Area | Olive Garage Doors](https://www.olivegaragedoors.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

If you need help **right now** , prioritize companies that explicitly state they have **24/7 dispatch or technicians** , such as **R &S Overhead Garage Door**, **Precision Garage Door** , **Integrity Garage Doors & Gates**, or **Nor-Cal Overhead** , since they specifically advertise emergency response rather than simply extended business hours.  

Give feedback
